Contact Us

Have a question, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? We'd love to hear from you.

Email

The fastest way to reach us is by email:

hello@grabscript.com

Bug Reports

If something isn't working right, please include:

  • The YouTube URL you tried
  • What you expected to happen
  • What actually happened (error message, blank result, etc.)
  • Your browser and device

Feature Requests

We're always looking to improve. If there's something you'd like GrabScript to do, let us know. Popular requests get prioritized.

Response Time

We aim to respond within 24-48 hours. Thanks for your patience.
